content.en:
"I've seen Duomi-sama!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

When Duomi saw Ye Tian, she was shocked again, just because there was an ultimate body of perfection in Ye Tian's body.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you have actually cultivated an Ultimate System to the Perfection Realm, and it is an Ultimate System that I have never seen before. Duomi was surprised.

"It's just that I was lucky to come across a treasure place. "

Ye Tian said.

Duo Mi said again: "Ye Tian Realm Lord, although you have cultivated an Ultimate System to the Perfection Realm, I still hope that you will not rush to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord, after all, once you fail to break through, no matter how many clones you have, you will have to die, even if your clones are special, you will not be able to compete with the power of the Dimensional Sea." "

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Later, he stated the purpose of his visit.

"Lord Duomi, I want to know the information of the Ultimate System of the Secret Domain. Ye Tian asked.

"The Ultimate System of the Secret Domain!" Duo Mi said: "This Ultimate System is a bit special, because the Extreme System of the Secret Domain helps to improve the will of the Ultimate, and it stands to reason that many Nine Realms Peaks will want to cultivate this system at the same time, but this Ultimate System has not spread much. The main reason is that it is difficult for this Ultimate System to continue to improve after becoming the Ultimate Realm Master. Moreover, this Ultimate 487 system has given birth to the Ultimate Realm Master, but that one has fallen, resulting in the quota being vacant. "

"The Extreme System of the Secret Domain has given birth to the Ultimate Realm Master!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" Duo Mi explained, "Countless years ago, many existences at the peak of the Nine Realms descended on the Secret Realm Heaven and Earth, and many of them broke through to the level of the Ultimate Lord, and one of them was very demonic, and broke through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm with the Extreme Realm System. But alas, this one has fallen. Moreover, there is still a problem with the ultimate system of the subterfuge, that is, once you comprehend the ultimate rules of the subterfuge, there will be a big trouble. Therefore, many Nine Realms peaks did not dare to cultivate this system at the same time. Even the Ultimate Realm Masters did not dare to cultivate this Ultimate System at the same time, lest something go wrong. "

"What's the trouble?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This is a secret that requires 300,000 contribution points to redeem. Domi said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian consumed 300,000 contribution points to exchange for this secret information.

Wow!

Duomi passed the secret information to Ye Tian.

Soon, Ye Tian obtained all the information about the Extreme System of the Secret Domain.

"It's because of this!"

The reason for all this is because of the existence of the Ultimate Realm Lord who broke through to the Ultimate Realm with the Extreme System of the Secret Domain-Blood Demon Extreme Venerable.

The Blood Demon Extreme Venerable broke through the Extreme Realm System to the Ultimate Realm Master, and then mastered several Ultimate Systems, all of which broke through to the Ultimate Realm Master level, and their strength was extremely terrifying.

Moreover, the Blood Demon Extreme Venerable has also mastered a terrifying ultimate system, the Blood Sea Ultimate System, which is known as the true immortality.

But because of something, the Blood Demon Extreme Venerable was still besieged and killed, but he also killed many Ultimate Realm Lords.

And after the fall of the Blood Demon Extreme Venerable, it turned into a strange blood shadow, and all the existences who comprehended the ultimate rules of treachery were targeted by this blood shadow.

Several Ultimate Realm Masters also comprehended the rules of the Ultimate Realm, and they couldn't wipe out the blood shadow, and finally had no choice but to cut off the Extreme System, and only then did they get rid of the blood shadow.

And other beings who have comprehended the ultimate rule of treachery, if they don't cut this ultimate system, they will be tortured to death by the blood shadow.

And since then, there is no existence at the peak of the Nine Realms to comprehend the ultimate system of treachery, but as long as you don't comprehend the ultimate system of treachery, it is not a big problem to cultivate the ultimate system of the treacherous realm, and you can also strengthen the ultimate will, which is very good.

"I didn't expect that the Extreme System of the Secret Domain would have such a trouble. "

Ye Tian frowned slightly, not knowing whether he should continue to cultivate the Secret Domain Ultimate System.

"Lord Duomi, can't you solve that blood shadow?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Maybe [BCEG] has a way, but I don't know. Domi shook her head, "Maybe the Ultimate Realm Masters have found a solution, but they haven't told me. "

Ye Tian's heart moved, maybe he could find an Ultimate Realm Lord to ask.

......

Abyssal Star Body.

Ye Tian looked at the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable who was there in the distance, and his heart moved, shuttling over.

"Is there anything you little guy have come to me for?"

Greataxe Extreme Venerable asked.

"The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable Senior, it is said that if you comprehend the ultimate system of the Secret Domain and comprehend the ultimate rules of the Evil Domain, you will be targeted by the blood shadow, I don't know if there is any solution?" Ye Tian asked.

"You kid was targeted by the Blood Shadow? No, although you have cultivated the Ultimate System of the Trick Domain, you have definitely not comprehended the Ultimate Rules of the Trick Realm, and you must not have been targeted. If you want to take the path of the Extreme System of the Secret Domain, I advise you to give up. Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said.

Ye Tian showed a look of disappointment.

"Who said I didn't know?" the Great Axe immediately retorted.

"In other words, Giant Axe Extreme Venerable Senior, do you know how to solve this problem?" Ye Tian was full of anticipation.

"I do know, but what can you come up with?" said the Great Axe Exaltate.

"Complete Abyss Ultimate!" Ye Tian assured: "If the method of the predecessors is really useful, I can share the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, how about it?"

He knew very well that it was not difficult for the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable to perfect the Abyss Ultimate System, it would just take some more years.

Therefore, now that he has traded the complete version of the Abyss Ultimate System, he has nothing to lose to himself, and he doesn't believe that the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable can break through to the Ultimate Realm one step ahead of himself in the Abyss Ultimate System.

"Okay, I agree!"

The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable was afraid that Ye Tian would regret it, so he agreed, and the two sides also left an ultimate oath.

After the Ultimate Oath was made, the Giant Axe Extreme Venerable revealed: "Actually, not too long ago, some Ultimate Realm Masters found a way to get rid of the Blood Shadow, and the Blood Shadow is actually the product of the fusion of the remnants of the Blood Sea Extreme Venerable and the Extreme Rules of the Trick, and also mixed with the power of the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and finally the product of coincidence. If you want to get rid of the blood shadow, you must first master the blood sea ultimate system, condense the blood sea ultimate body of the consummation realm, and then comprehend the rules of the treacherous ultimate rule. In this way, the aura on the body will be similar to that of the blood shadow, so that the blood shadow will think that it is the same kind and will not come to entangle. This is also verified by a Nine Realms Peak, and it is absolutely reliable. "

"I see. "

Ye Tian understood.
